title: AgentSession
description: A persistent agent execution session. One session corresponds to a single chat-thread/agent-stage finite-state-machine instance.

id.description: Internal primary key (cuid). Optional in transit; generated by storage layer if omitted.

sessionId.description: Globally unique session identifier (visible to clients and used for resume).

chatId.description: The chat thread this session is bound to. One chat may host multiple sequential sessions.

nextStage.description: Pre-computed next stage hint, may be overridden by policy.

scenario.description: Scenario tag used to select the FSM definition (e.g. 'agent-entry', 'cflog-operator').

stageData.description: Free-form per-stage state bag. Should remain JSON-serializable.

isActive.description: Whether the session is still accepting new turns.
